AkashBhuta.title: Akash'bhuta
setup: Put [i]Unsustainable Akash'bhuta[/i] into play, “Choking Overgrowth” side up, with 50 HP.{BR}Reveal cards from the villain deck until {H - 1} Primeval Limbs are revealed. Put them into play and shuffle the other revealed cards back into the villain deck.
gameplay: When {AkashBhuta} would deal herself energy damage, she regains half that much HP instead, rounded up.
At the end of the villain turn, each villain target regains 1 HP.
The second time a non-hero card enters its trash each turn, flip {AkashBhuta}. {AkashBhuta} flips only once each turn.
AkashBhuta.advanced: When {AkashBhuta} flips to this side, play the top card of the environment deck.
flippedGameplay: When {AkashBhuta} would deal herself energy damage, destroy 1 hero ongoing or equipment card instead.
At the end of the villain turn, each villain target deals the hero target with the highest HP 1 fire damage.
The second time a non-hero card enters its trash each turn, flip {AkashBhuta}. {AkashBhuta} flips only once each turn.
AkashBhuta.flippedAdvanced: When {Akashbhuta} flips to this side, destroy an environment card. If a card was destroyed this way, {H - 1} players discard a card.

openingLines.default: I will tolerate no more attempts to bend nature to the will of man. If destroying them is what it takes for chaos to survive, I will not spend long in mourning.
openingLines.TheArgentAdeptCharacter: Humanity has always been at war with itself and everything around it. None of you will survive.
If we work in concert, we will generate the harmonies of victory!
openingLines.PrimeWardensArgentAdeptCharacter: Today, the heartbeat of the wild places will drown out your song for good.
Let us strike the chords of harmony! Stand fast against discordance!
openingLines.XtremePrimeWardensArgentAdeptCharacter: Listen- do you hear the stillness on the wind? That is the sound of the future- with none of you in it.
It's time to let freedom rock! [b]yeaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaahhhhhhh![/b]
openingLines.DarkConductorArgentAdeptCharacter: Your song is so dull now. I will listen carefully, though, to make sure I notice when I crush you.
Attend! I shall set the tempo for this conflict. Move to my beat, and there will be victory. Fail to do so, and you will Danse Macabre.
openingLines.CaptainCosmicCharacter: Your little golden sparks will be as easy to extinguish as your lives.
Your evil-doing days are numbered, no matter how dangerous you are! Have at them, allies!
openingLines.PrimeWardensCaptainCosmicCharacter: This world is mine to shape, and my vision has no more room for man. If you wish to survive, then flee.
From the cosmos to realms beyond, your villainy shall go no further!
openingLines.XtremePrimeWardensCaptainCosmicCharacter: I am eternal and all-encompassing... and you bring guns to shoot at me. Are you lost, little hunter?
I've got more golden guns than you've had hot dinners! Come and have a go if you think you're hard enough!
openingLines.CaptainCosmicRequitalCharacter: You could have survived this, if you had the sense to flee. This world is mine, but I would begrudge you no others.
My brother gave me another chance to protect the cosmos from the likes of you. His sacrifice will not be in vain!
openingLines.FanaticCharacter: I am the only creator this world has ever known. I will be its destroyer, as well.
Repent, evildoer! You cannot stand against divine might!
openingLines.RedeemerFanaticCharacter: When the earth swallows you whole and spits out the bones of those you protect, what will you believe?
My faith is unwavering. My strength comes from grace alone.
openingLines.PrimeWardensFanaticCharacter: Yes- turn your sword on me, like you do with everything you don't understand. Spirit though you may be, humankind has taught you well.
Repent! Turn back from thy evil ways, before it is too late!
openingLines.XtremePrimeWardensFanaticCharacter: This world is my body, and at long last I will cast you out.
All impurities burn away in the light! Your evil will be cleansed in holy fire!
openingLines.HakaCharacter: Your life force is extraordinary. You may yet survive what is coming... but you will not stop it.
Ha[b]ha![/b] Battle! This will be fun!
openingLines.TheEternalHakaCharacter: Your day has finally come, old one. When I am through, you will be the last of humanity.
Allied with heroes once again? It is a good day. I hope to protect you all.
openingLines.PrimeWardensHakaCharacter: If you choose to stand with those who destroy and despoil, then you will fall with them as well.
I have seen many foes. You will not be the one to lay the great Haka low.
openingLines.XtremePrimeWardensHakaCharacter: Old as you are, you have never seen a civilization fall. That changes today.
Come at me with all your might! It's time for us to go toe-to-toe! Everyone together now. Ka Mate! Ka Mate!
openingLines.TempestCharacter: I am the land and the sea and all that grows upon them. What hope do you have to oppose me?
You fight the strength of the storm. Face the maelstrom!
openingLines.TempestFreedomSixCharacter: No storm will quiet me this time. You face the world in uproar.
I have faced far worse than you could possibly imagine. Stand down.
openingLines.PrimeWardensTempestCharacter: I offer one chance for you and your people to join me. You know the monstrosity that lurks in the human heart. Why fight for them?
Monsters come in all manner of shape and size. Your plots shall fail.
openingLines.XtremePrimeWardensTempestCharacter: Every stone, every branch, every leaf is mine to command. What power do you have here?
Look to the skies. See what I am about to unleash upon you. You think you can hope to stand against the storm?
